title: Principal Plant Manager at Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates
company: Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates:
Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates!
